meta.title: SF-SGI-2: Cortex Search, Document AI, and GenAI Operations

questions.stem: A candidate is reviewing certification objectives. which Snowflake capability lets analysts call large language models directly from SQL without moving data out of Snowflake?

options.text: Snowpark Container Services
Snowflake Cortex AISQL functions such as `COMPLETE`
Dynamic tables
Secure data sharing

questions.explanation:
**A** is incorrect because Snowpark Container Services does not best fit the documented requirement in this scenario.

**B** is correct because Snowflake Cortex AISQL functions such as `COMPLETE` matches the documented behavior or feature used in this scenario.

**C** is incorrect because Dynamic tables does not best fit the documented requirement in this scenario.

**D** is incorrect because Secure data sharing does not best fit the documented requirement in this scenario.

See [Official reference](https://docs.snowflake.com/en/sql-reference/functions/complete-snowflake-cortex).

questions.stem: A certification-style scenario describes how team wants short summaries of support tickets stored in a table. Which SQL function is purpose-built for this task?

options.text: `SUMMARIZE`
`TRANSLATE`
`SEARCH_PREVIEW`
`COUNT_TOKENS`

questions.explanation:
**A** is correct because `SUMMARIZE` matches the documented behavior or feature used in this scenario.

questions.stem: A certification-style scenario describes how developer is preparing a `COMPLETE` call that uses chat-style messages. Which TWO elements are valid message components? (Select TWO)

options.text: Using a role such as `system` or `user`
Using an array containing structured message objects
Using a mandatory warehouse size parameter inside the message body
Using a required embedding vector attached to every message

questions.explanation:

**D** is incorrect because Using a required embedding vector attached to every message does not best fit the documented requirement in this scenario.

See [Official reference](https://docs.snowflake.com/en/sql-reference/functions/complete-snowflake-cortex).

questions.stem: A certification-style scenario describes how team needs deterministic extraction of invoice fields and wants to minimize creative variation in model output. Which change is MOST appropriate?

options.text: Increase temperature and top_p
Lower temperature and constrain the prompt to the required fields
Switch to a larger warehouse only
Replace SQL calls with manual annotation

questions.explanation:

options.text: To create vector representations for semantic search or similarity tasks

questions.stem: A certification-style scenario describes how data scientist wants to compare prompt revisions for sentiment extraction. Which approach is MOST aligned with Snowflake usage?

options.text: Store prompt versions and compare outputs on a representative evaluation set
Use only the newest prompt because evaluation is unnecessary
Change warehouses between runs and treat cost changes as quality signals
Disable SQL history to avoid noisy comparisons

options.text: Process rows in larger, well-planned batches instead of many tiny ad hoc calls
Move all data to a client laptop and call external APIs there
Replace every LLM call with a dynamic table

questions.stem: A team is evaluating the next step. what is Snowflake Cortex Search designed to provide?

options.text: Create a Cortex Search service on the source data and let Snowflake maintain the search index
Export the documents nightly to a spreadsheet

Use only metadata filters without any indexed content

options.text: Retrieve relevant context from a search service

options.text: Improve chunking and indexed source selection so the search corpus contains cleaner, task-relevant text
Increase the number of user roles with access to the service
Lower warehouse auto-suspend to 1 minute
Convert the policy manuals to JPEG images only

questions.explanation:

questions.stem: A design review asks for justification. why is least-privilege access especially important for enterprise GenAI apps?

options.text: Because retrieved context may include business data that many users should not see
Because it makes tokenization mathematically impossible
Because warehouses cannot run without ACCOUNTADMIN

questions.explanation:
